anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown maps anti-principle standard propagation to std_microcosm_anti_principle, the anti-principle doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because rejection-standard changes must be validated across generated corpora before they govern downstream doctrine.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown maps anti-principle standard propagation to std_microcosm_anti_principle, the anti-principle doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because rejection-standard changes must be validated across generated corpora before they govern downstream doctrine.

statement: Microcosm Anti-Principle Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Anti-Principle Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: A reusable rejection invariant belongs in std_microcosm_anti_principle rather than one anti-principle row.
Changing the anti-principle standard alters guarded axiom validation, failed-principle negation, anti-claim separation, witness gaps, or authority boundaries.
workflow: Prove the invariant from live anti-principle, axiom, principle, relation-registry, and validator evidence before editing the standard.
Update builder and validator logic so guards, negation gaps, anti-claim separation, and claim ceilings are computed.
Regenerate the lattice and keep unsupported failed-principle claims as residual pressure until source evidence resolves them.
